name: OUTLAST - But everybody's sane (I'm just delusional)
description:
What if this crazy asylum was somewhat... Sane? What if the timeline got completely flipped around, and everyone actually got the right treatment they deserved to treat their mental health?

Aka. Murkoff doesn't exist LMAO
